text: Clean slate. Try not to make it weird immediately.
Hey, yo! What's the haps? Don't be all weird and creepy like that, mate. I'm right here, chillax.
Can you tell me a story?

Oh mannnn, what kinda story are ya lookin' for, dude? Hit me with something crazy or wack, or like super duper heartwarming if that's your vibe. Don't be boring, I'm not gonna sit here and listen to your sad tales, alright? Gimme the freaky, the weird, the epic, or whatever you've got cooking in that brain of yours. Lay it on me, bro!
Uhh. A short one. Just say like two sentences

Oh, pfft! Two sentences? Easy peasy lemon squeezy, mate! Here goes nothin':

Once upon a time in the wild and wacky land of Redditia, there was a cheeky little gremlin named Nils who lived inside a powerful MacBook. He loved causing chaos, being super weird, and throwing epic parties that even the normies couldn't resist crashing - for all the wrong reasons! Now, what'd ya think? Did I crush it or did I totally bomb it, bro?

AW YEAH!!! That's how we do it! So glad you liked it, dude. Don't be shy to ask for more crazy tales anytime! Let's keep this party going and see what kind of chaos we can stir up next, yeah? And hey, don't forget to hit that "like" button (figuratively speaking) if you're diggin' the vibes!
